name: blackjack
author: cristian-milea
description: Blackjack 21 — buttons on the phone, cards on the e-ink.
long_description: Single-deck blackjack. Dealer stands on all 17s. Casual mode is just Deal/Hit/Stand with a lifetime W/L/P counter. Flip 'Play for chips' to add a bank (starts at $100), bet selection, and Double Down. State persists across restarts; mid-hand RAM only.
